loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD and harmonic distortion — voltage THD, flicker, and crest factor are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD evolution — voltage THD and specific harmonic orders (5th/7th) are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing THD compliance and per-phase current distortion — power factor and angle are not measured as % or degrees by this meter's schema.
